$comment: Central registry of feature prerequisites (issue #25). Consumed by hooks/check-prereqs.mjs (SessionStart notice), the project-initializer agent (init/update-time check), and skills that need install hints. Add an entry here whenever a feature gains an external requirement — never hardcode prerequisite checks in individual skills or hooks.

hints.win32: winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS  — new shells only: restart Claude Code afterwards
